query:
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.programId FROM turmas t WHERE t.id = 30002;
SELECT ap.id, ap.trilhaId, ap.status, tr.name as trilhaNome FROM assessment_pdi ap JOIN trilhas tr ON tr.id = ap.trilhaId WHERE ap.alunoId = 30040;
command:

SELECT ap.id, ap.trilhaId, ap.status, tr.name as trilhaNome FROM assessment_pdi ap JOIN trilhas tr ON tr.id = ap.trilhaId WHERE ap.alunoId = 30040;
